Note: Car exterior - white , Car interior - black , Car make - Nissan , Car model - Sentra

The user / PT had trouble navigating through the glasses to find the instagram app. It took us close to 10 min trying to navigate through. They also had bit of challenge with the hand gesture responsible for adjusting the volume.
I noticed that the band would occasionally disconnect and that affected affected the user’s ability to use the glasses as they didnt respond to the hand gestures.

The user / PT was naturally inclined to choose a darker background to be able to see clearly through the glasses. They had their gaze 
focus on the bottom of the dashboard right above their knees.
